category_sources: Official repository README describes TrueCrack as a brute-force password cracker for TrueCrypt volumes with CPU/GPU support.
source_facts.description says it is a brute-force password cracker for TrueCrypt.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the display name TrueCrack.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents what TrueCrack is, usage, configuration, and installation.
repo_sources: Official repository README lists https://github.com/lvaccaro/truecrack as the project website.
source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official repository README mentions dictionary/alphabet attacks, CUDA optimization, CPU/GPU operation, and command-line usage.
